creator: ian@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195345
Patch for compatibility with base ntpd user

Openntpd creates a user:group of _ntp:_ntp with ids 123:123.  The base system now has an ntpd user with those numeric ids and a different home dir.

Pass the --with-privsep-user=ntpd arg to configure on newer freebsd systems, and make a runtime check for chroot dir permissions compatible with the way freebsd base configures the ntpd home dir (owned by ntpd not root).
